subcodes.title: Words to some Baha'is, spoken on 1912-09-04
subcodes.first_line: The greatness of the teachings of Baha'u'llah will be known when they are acted upon and practiced.
subcodes.first_line_orig: عظمت تعالیم حضرت بهآءالله وقتی معلوم می شود که بموقع عمل و اجرا آید هنوز از صد یکی اجرا نشده
subcodes.subjects: @exhortations and counsels, @goodly deeds; actions, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
